untranslatable_reason: PDI (Plus Directional Indicator) and MDI (Minus Directional Indicator) are not in the allowed indicator list. These are components of the Directional Movement System (DMS) and are distinct from ADX_14. Additionally, the signal requires entry via stop orders at specific price levels (today's high/low on next day), which requires order type and price level management not supported by the condition-based rule structure.
translation_notes: Signal uses PDI/MDI crossovers which require custom Directional Movement indicators not available in the allowed set. The stop order entry mechanism (buy stop at prev_high, sell stop at prev_low) cannot be fully expressed with the available operators and must be implemented at the backtest engine level. Reversal exits have been inferred from the crossover logic.
